import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')

import os
import json
import torch
import numpy as np
from PIL import Image

# Test the new predict.py on one validation object
data_dir = os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR', '/data')
val_dir = os.path.join(data_dir, 'val')
objects = sorted(os.listdir(val_dir))[:1]
uid = objects[0]

print(f"Testing on object: {uid}")

# Run predict on single object
os.system(f'python predict.py --data_path {val_dir} --checkpoint checkpoints/dummy.pt --output /tmp/test_v2.json')

# Check output
renders_dir = '/tmp/test_v2_renders'
if os.path.exists(renders_dir):
    obj_dir = os.path.join(renders_dir, uid)
    if os.path.exists(obj_dir):
        files = sorted(os.listdir(obj_dir))
        print(f"Rendered {len(files)} views for {uid}")
        
        # Check first rendered view
        render = Image.open(os.path.join(obj_dir, files[0]))
        render_arr = np.array(render)
        print(f"Render: mode={render.mode}, size={render.size}")
        print(f"Render RGBA stats: min={render_arr.min()}, max={render_arr.max()}, mean={render_arr.mean():.1f}")
        print(f"Render alpha stats: min={render_arr[:,:,3].min()}, max={render_arr[:,:,3].max()}, mean={render_arr[:,:,3].mean():.1f}")
        
        # Compare with GT
        gt_path = os.path.join(val_dir, uid, 'target_views', files[0])
        if os.path.exists(gt_path):
            gt = Image.open(gt_path)
            gt_arr = np.array(gt)
            print(f"\nGT: mode={gt.mode}, size={gt.size}")
            print(f"GT RGBA stats: min={gt_arr.min()}, max={gt_arr.max()}, mean={gt_arr.mean():.1f}")
            print(f"GT alpha stats: min={gt_arr[:,:,3].min()}, max={gt_arr[:,:,3].max()}, mean={gt_arr[:,:,3].mean():.1f}")
            
            # Compute simple MSE on RGB where both have alpha > 0
            r_alpha = render_arr[:,:,3] > 128
            g_alpha = gt_arr[:,:,3] > 128
            both = r_alpha & g_alpha
            if both.sum() > 0:
                mse = ((render_arr[:,:,:3][both].astype(float) - gt_arr[:,:,:3][both].astype(float))**2).mean()
                print(f"\nMSE on overlapping foreground: {mse:.1f}")
else:
    print("No renders directory found!")
